recommendations.title: Hungry Hearts
recommendations.overview: The relationship of a couple who meet by chance in New York City is put to the test when they encounter a life or death circumstance.

recommendations.title: Hichki
recommendations.overview: Hichki presents a positive and inspiring story about a woman who turns her biggest weakness into her biggest strength.

recommendations.title: Intimacy
recommendations.overview: Failed musician Jay abandoned his family and now earns a living as head bartender in a trendy London pub. Every Wednesday afternoon, a woman comes to his house for graphic, almost wordless, sex. One day, Jay follows her and learns about her. This eve

recommendations.title: Drift
recommendations.overview: In the 70s two brothers battle killer waves, conservative society and ruthless bikers to kick-start the modern surf industry.

recommendations.title: Redacted
recommendations.overview: A fictional documentary discusses the effects the Iraq war has had on soldiers and local people through interviews with members of an American military unit, the media, and local Iraqis.

recommendations.title: The Factory
recommendations.overview: An obsessed cop is on the trail of a serial killer prowling the streets of Buffalo, N.Y. but when his teenage daughter disappears, he drops any professional restraint to get the killer.

recommendations.title: An Interview with God
recommendations.overview: An up-and-coming journalist finds his world and faith increasingly challenged when he's granted the interview of a lifetime – with someone who claims to be God.

recommendations.title: The King of Comedy
recommendations.overview: Aspiring comic Rupert Pupkin attempts to achieve success in show business by stalking his idol, a late night talk-show host who craves his own privacy.

recommendations.title: Goldstone
recommendations.overview: Indigenous Detective Jay Swan arrives in the frontier town of Goldstone on a missing persons inquiry. What seems like a simple investigation unearths an intricate web of crime, corruption, human trafficking, and coordinated exploitation of indigenous

recommendations.title: Mystery Road
recommendations.overview: A murdered girl is found under a bridge on a remote road and indigenous detective Jay Swan gets the case. Jay finds that no-one is that interested in solving the murder of an indigenous teenager and he is forced to work alone.
